attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: CSS class for link (either a string or list)

attrs.name: disabled
attrs.doc: disables the link. This will turn an <a> into a <button> (<a> tags can't be disabled)

attrs.name: multiple
attrs.doc: When true, multiple sections can be expanded simultaneously

attrs.name: on_toggle
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when an accordion section is toggled (LiveView.JS only)

attrs.name: open_index
attrs.doc: Index of item to be open at render

attrs.name: close_button_properties
attrs.doc: a list of properties passed to the close button

attrs.name: on_dismiss
attrs.doc: JS commands to run when the alert is dismissed. Automatically adds a close button with built-in hide behavior.

attrs.name: random_color
attrs.doc: generates a random color for placeholder initials avatar

attrs.name: avatars
attrs.doc: list of your hosted avatar URLs

attrs.name: icon
attrs.doc: name of a Heroicon at the front of the button

attrs.name: aria_label
attrs.doc: the ARIA label for the button group

attrs.name: button_bg_class
attrs.doc: class to customize the button background colors

attrs.name: button_border_class
attrs.doc: class to customize the button border styles

attrs.name: container_class
attrs.doc: class to apply to the group container

attrs.name: font_weight_class
attrs.doc: the font weight class to apply to all buttons - defaults to font-medium

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: any extra CSS class for the parent container

attrs.name: menu_items_wrapper_class
attrs.doc: any extra CSS class for menu item wrapper container

attrs.name: on_close
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when the dropdown closes (LiveView.JS only)

attrs.name: trigger_class
attrs.doc: additional classes for the trigger button

attrs.name: checked
attrs.doc: the checked flag for checkboxes and checkbox groups

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: the class to add to the input

attrs.name: clearable
attrs.doc: If true, adds a clear button to clear the field value

attrs.name: copy_icon
attrs.doc: Icon name for the copy button

attrs.name: copyable
attrs.doc: If true, adds a copy button to the field and disables the input

attrs.name: disabled_options
attrs.doc: the options to disable in a checkbox group

attrs.name: empty_message
attrs.doc: the message to display when there are no options available, for checkbox-group or radio-group

attrs.name: errors
attrs.doc: a list of errors to display. If not passed, it will be generated automatically from the field. Format is a list of strings.

attrs.name: field
attrs.doc: a form field struct retrieved from the form, for example: @form[:email]

attrs.name: group_layout
attrs.doc: the layout of the inputs in a group (checkbox-group or radio-group)

attrs.name: id
attrs.doc: the id of the input. If not passed, it will be generated automatically from the field

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: the label for the input. If not passed, it will be generated automatically from the field

attrs.name: multiple
attrs.doc: the multiple flag for select inputs

attrs.name: name
attrs.doc: the name of the input. If not passed, it will be generated automatically from the field

attrs.name: no_margin
attrs.doc: removes the margin from the field wrapper

attrs.name: options
attrs.doc: the options to pass to Phoenix.HTML.Form.options_for_select/2

attrs.name: required
attrs.doc: is this field required? is passed to the input and adds an asterisk next to the label

attrs.name: rest
attrs.doc: All other props go on the input

attrs.name: selected
attrs.doc: the selected value for select inputs

attrs.name: size
attrs.doc: the size of the switch (xs, sm, md, lg or xl) or radio card (sm, md or lg)

attrs.name: value
attrs.doc: the value of the input. If not passed, it will be generated automatically from the field

attrs.name: viewable
attrs.doc: If true, adds a toggle to show/hide the password text

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the help text

attrs.name: no_margin
attrs.doc: removes the margin from the field wrapper

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: no_margin
attrs.doc: removes the bottom margin from the field wrapper

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the help text

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: CSS classes to add to your label

attrs.name: compound
attrs.doc: Avoid using label/for for compound inputs

slots.name: inner_block
slots.doc: The inner block of the button.

attrs.name: rest
attrs.doc: the arbitrary HTML attributes for the heroicon container

attrs.name: checked
attrs.doc: the checked flag for checkbox inputs

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: the class to add to the input

attrs.name: clearable
attrs.doc: If true, adds a clear button to clear the field value

attrs.name: copyable
attrs.doc: If true, adds a copy button to the field and disables the input

attrs.name: field
attrs.doc: a form field struct retrieved from the form, for example: @form[:email]

attrs.name: multiple
attrs.doc: the multiple flag for select inputs

attrs.name: options
attrs.doc: the options to pass to Phoenix.HTML.Form.options_for_select/2

attrs.name: viewable
attrs.doc: If true, adds a toggle to show/hide the password text

attrs.name: max_height
attrs.doc: Maximum height of the marquee container

attrs.name: max_width
attrs.doc: Maximum width of the marquee container

attrs.name: pause_on_hover
attrs.doc: Pause the marquee when the user hovers over the cards

attrs.name: repeat
attrs.doc: Number of times to repeat the content

attrs.name: reverse
attrs.doc: Reverse the direction of the marquee

attrs.name: close_modal_target
attrs.doc: close_modal_target allows you to target a specific live component for the close event to go to. eg: close_modal_target={@myself}

attrs.name: close_on_click_away
attrs.doc: whether the modal should close when a user clicks away

attrs.name: close_on_escape
attrs.doc: whether the modal should close when a user hits escape

attrs.name: hide_close_button
attrs.doc: whether or not the modal should have a close button in the header

attrs.name: on_cancel
attrs.doc: a JS function to execute when the modal is closed. Defaults to pushing close_modal event

attrs.name: on_open
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when the modal opens

attrs.name: event
attrs.doc: whether to use `phx-click` events instead of linking. Enabling this will disable `link_type` and `path`.

attrs.name: show_boundary_chevrons
attrs.doc: whether to show prev & next buttons at boundary pages

attrs.name: target
attrs.doc: the LiveView/LiveComponent to send the event to. Example: `@myself`. Will be ignored if `event` is not enabled.

attrs.name: max
attrs.doc: sets a max value for your progress bar

attrs.name: value
attrs.doc: adds a value to your progress bar

attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the rating wrapper

attrs.name: include_label
attrs.doc: Whether to include an automatically generated rating label

attrs.name: label_class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the rating label

attrs.name: rating
attrs.doc: The rating to display (integer or float)

attrs.name: round_to_nearest_half
attrs.doc: Whether to round the rating to the nearest half star (eg. 3.3 -> 3.5

attrs.name: star_class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the individual stars. Eg. you could change the size of the stars with 'h-10 w-10'

attrs.name: total
attrs.doc: The total number of stars to display

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the star

attrs.name: type
attrs.doc: The type of star to display

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: close_on_click_away
attrs.doc: whether the slideover should close when a user clicks away

attrs.name: close_on_escape
attrs.doc: whether the slideover should close when a user hits escape

attrs.name: close_slide_over_target
attrs.doc: close_slide_over_target allows you to target a specific live component for the close event to go to. eg: close_slide_over_target={@myself}

attrs.name: on_close
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when the slide over closes

attrs.name: on_open
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when the slide over opens

attrs.name: size_class
attrs.doc: custom CSS classes for size. eg: h-4 w-4

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: number
attrs.doc: indicates a number next to your tab

attrs.name: on_change
attrs.doc: JS commands to run when this tab is selected

attrs.name: row_click
attrs.doc: the function for handling phx-click on each row

attrs.name: row_id
attrs.doc: the function for generating the row id

attrs.name: row_item
attrs.doc: the function for mapping each row before calling the :col slot

attrs.name: rows
attrs.doc: the list of rows to render

slots.name: empty_state
slots.doc: A message to show when the table is empty, to be used together with :col

attrs.name: avatar_src
attrs.doc: the current signed in user's avatar image src

attrs.name: current_user_name
attrs.doc: the current signed in user's name

attrs.name: user_menu_items
attrs.doc: list of maps with keys :path, :icon (atom), :label, :method (atom - optional)

attrs.name: avatar_assigns
attrs.doc: if using an avatar, this map will be passed to the avatar component as props

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: Adds a label your user, e.g name

attrs.name: sub_label
attrs.doc: Adds a sub-label your to your user, e.g title

attrs.name: on_toggle
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when a submenu is toggled (LiveView.JS only)
